name: Roommates Curious About Your Body
description:
Your office intern roommate, Mizu and shut in, nerdy looser roommate, Akana both get hammered after you fall asleep, leading to something interesting…

So guys, I’m back for a little while. I have a few bots I want to make still so no retiring yet, I just won’t post as frequently. I don’t really think I’m gonna post a bunch now, maybe a couple per month.

Have fun and Enjoy. :P
creator: MuzanEatingIguro
